description_long: This object is a modern laptop with a dark-colored keyboard base and a lighter, possibly metallic, lid. The screen is open and displays a user interface with multiple windows, suggesting it is powered on and in use. The keyboard area features a touchpad and a visible sticker on the right palm rest, which is a common placement for branding or hardware specification labels. The laptop's sides show several ports, including USB and possibly HDMI, indicating versatile connectivity. The overall design is sleek and compact, with a thin profile and rounded edges. The hinge mechanism is robust, allowing the screen to remain upright at a comfortable viewing angle.
description: A sleek, modern laptop with a dark keyboard base, light metallic lid, open screen displaying content, and visible side ports and stickers.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open screen with visible content, keyboard, touchpad, and a sticker on the right palm rest.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the thin profile, visible ports, and the contrast between the dark base and light lid.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the screen and the hinge, with the light lid dominating the view.
description_view_3: Right side view displaying additional ports and the sticker on the palm rest, as well as the laptop's slim design.
attribute_screen_state: Screen is open and powered on, displaying a user interface with multiple windows.
attribute_keyboard_layout: QWERTY layout with function row; no numeric keypad visible; standard laptop keyboard.
attribute_sticker_placement: A rectangular sticker is present on the right palm rest area, featuring a yellow and black design.
